case_title: JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC VS. MAYNARDO IGNACIO

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-22-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-20-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-20-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-22-2019 - CASE SETTLED. PAUL MARTIN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MAYNARDO IGNACIO APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT AGREE THAT THE DEBT BALANCE OWED WILL BE $10,615.40, WHICH IS HALF OF THE ORIGINAL AMOUNT OF DAMAGES, PAYABLE IN THREE MONTHS. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $5,300.00 IN 6 WEEKS AND THE REMAINING BALANCE IS DUE BY THE END OF 3 MONTHS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON NOV-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100049942) FILED BY ATTORNEY VOS, RYAN E.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT IGNACIO, MAYNARDO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-02-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035773), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC SERVED JUL-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IGNACIO, MAYNARDO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT IGNACIO, MAYNARDO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100049942)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001728) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-26-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
